vocab.meaning: sự thay đổi mang tính bước ngoặt trong tư duy/nhận thức
vocab.example: Studying quantum mechanics led to a complete paradigm shift in how I perceive the physical world.
The most fascinating aspect is learning how to gather empirical evidence to support or debunk long-standing theories.

vocab.meaning: những hiểu biết đa ngành/liên ngành
vocab.example: I love how my course provides cross-disciplinary insights, linking historical events with modern economic trends.
Developing a robust theoretical framework for my thesis has been a challenging yet incredibly rewarding process.

vocab.meaning: khám phá/giải mã những bí ẩn của...
vocab.example: My studies allow me to slowly unravel the mysteries of human linguistics and how language shapes our thoughts.

vocab.meaning: sự phân tích khắt khe/nghiêm ngặt
vocab.example: The most engaging part of the curriculum is performing rigorous analysis on environmental data sets.

vocab.meaning: khơi gợi sự tò mò/hứng thú
vocab.example: The modules on artificial ethics really pique my interest because they address the future of humanity.

vocab.meaning: sự hiểu biết toàn diện/tổng thể
vocab.example: I value the holistic understanding of the global supply chain that I've gained through my logistics major.
Seeing the practical application of abstract mathematical formulas in civil engineering is truly enlightening.

vocab.meaning: sự khắt khe/tính chuẩn mực trong học thuật
vocab.example: The academic rigor of this program pushes me to refine my research skills beyond what I thought possible.
